title: aegilops bicornis
intro: Aegilops bicornis, also known as two-horned spelt or two-horned goat grass, is a species of wild grass in the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its antispasmodic and diuretic properties, helping to relieve muscle cramps and excess fluid in the body. The health benefits of Aegilops bicornis include its ability to reduce inflammation, lower blood pressure, and improve digestion. Aegilops bicornis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to be used for medicinal purposes, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
